privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for system_advisor_model_env optimize_gcr_land_cost_tradeoff task by confirming that the task involves real-world meteorological data via NREL SAM TMY weather profiles, and verifying that all mathematical constants (e.g. 333333.33 m2 module area, $60,000/acre land cost, 0.08 FCR) perfectly match the explicit constraints defined in the task instructions and evaluation scripts. A test PySAM simulation confirmed these inputs logically produce an optimal GCR of 0.5 within the strictly decreasing required energy bounds of 80 to 140 GWh.
